testcase.name: setUp

error.message: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: session not created: DevToolsActivePort file doesn't exist Host info: host: 'DESKTOP-TAKAIVJ', ip: '192.168.31.115' Build info: version: '4.41.0', revision: '9fc754f' System info: os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.8' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[Capabilities {browserName: chrome, goog:chromeOptions: {args: [], binary: C:\Program Files\Google\Chr..., extensions: []}}]}]
